summary.diagnosis:
*Jul 5→Jul 11 vs Jun 28→Jul 4* · Revenue -19% (1,055,778 vs 1,306,156 EGP) · Spend -19% · ROAS 5.55 (+0%).
   • CPC: 2.54 → 2.17 EGP (-15%, down (good))
   • CVR: 1.28% → 1.07% (-16%, down (drag))
   • AOV: 1,098 → 1,130 EGP (+3%, ~flat)
   *Who moved it:* *CVR 49%* of the move (hurt, -207,796 EGP)  ·  *CPC 43%* of the move (helped, +32,400 EGP)  ·  *AOV 8%* of the move (helped, +29,888 EGP).
   *Read:* *CVR* fell -16%, the biggest of the three.
     Worth about *-207,796 EGP of revenue at the same clicks*.
     That drove ROAS +0%.
     Revenue -19% because spend -19%.
   *Deeper:* biggest single mover was *BBG PJS lebleb*, its CVR went 3.7%→0.86% on 3,552 EGP spend (~23% of the swing).
